headline: Laboratory Equipment Services Market by Service Type, Service Provider, Equipment Type, Contract Type - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The global laboratory equipment services market is set to soar, reaching USD 35.4 billion by 2030, expanding from USD 18 billion in 2025, with a CAGR of 14.5%. This growth is spurred by increased R&D investments, higher healthcare spending, and technological advancements. The Asia-Pacific region leads with the highest CAGR, fueled by robust infrastructure growth in countries like China and India. Dominating segments include analytical equipment and the comprehensive Gold Support Plan. Key driver
